title: Create independent SCHC fragmentation test vectors (schc_fragment.json)
description: Add test/vectors/schc_fragment.json with vectors for single-fragment, multi-fragment, window boundary, ACK-on-error, MIC fail, out-of-order, retransmit cases. Use RFC 8724 examples or external oracle (not derived from any LICHEN impl). Update generate.py, schema, and test harnesses. Ensure interop tests pass for all 3 impls.
